name: MSI B450M PRO-VDH MAX Micro ATX Motherboard - Socket AM4 - AMD B450 Chipset - Supports DDR4-3466+(OC) - 1x PCIe 3.0 x16 - 2x PCIe 2.0 x1 - 1x M.2 Socket3 - VGA - HDMI - DVI-D - USB 3.2 Gen1 Type-A - Gigabit LAN (B450PVDHMAX)
shortName: MSI B450M PRO-VDH MAX Micro ATX Motherboard - Socket AM4 - AMD B450
description: Micro ATX motherboard with multiple display outputs and M.2 support for AM4 platform.
